title: Greenway Depot: Two-Constraint Collection Routes
strategies: next-fit dispatch baseline: keep loading the current truck in arrival order and dispatch it the moment a container breaks the mass OR bulk limit, never looking back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
first-fit in arrival order: load each container onto the lowest-index truck with room on BOTH axes, reusing earlier gaps but never reordering the queue

decreasing-order vector packing: seat the heaviest/bulkiest containers first via first-fit / best-fit on a normalized (mass/W, bulk/V) key, sweeping several sort keys and keeping the fewest-truck plan so small containers top off partial trucks on both axes
seeded local search: start from a decreasing-order plan and relocate/swap containers or run perturb-and-reoptimize restarts to reclaim wasted mass-and-bulk headroom trucks leave open
